title: Riot Platforms Reports Second Quarter 2025 Financial Results and Strategic Highlights
text: Riot reported total revenue of $153.0 million in Q2 2025, compared to $70.0 million for the same quarter in 2024. The company achieved a net income of $219.5 million, or $0.65 per share. Bitcoin Mining revenue was $140.9 million for the quarter, compared to $55.8 million for the same three-month period in 2024. Riot produced 1,426 bitcoin in Q2, compared to 844 during the same three-month period in 2024. The significant revenue and earnings increase was driven by substantially higher Bitcoin prices during Q2 2025. The company's operational efficiency improved with deployed hash rate reaching higher levels. Strategic partnerships with AMD are generating meaningful data center revenue contributions. The company continues to expand its AI/HPC capacity at the Corsicana facility.
